mirror.title: Зеркала пакетов по умолчанию
mirror.subtitle: Для каждой поддерживаемой пары (платформа, версия) выберите, какое зеркало новые и существующие хосты этого семейства используют по умолчанию. Облако означает, что хосты обращаются к публичному upstream напрямую. Подходят только зеркала, завершившие успешную синхронизацию.

The most likely causes are: the agent crashed mid-plan, the WebSocket dropped before the command_result was sent, or the agent silently de-duplicated the command without emitting a result. Check the agent log on this host and consider restarting the sysmanage-agent service. Click Refresh / Install Tools again to retry — the in-flight marker will be cleared and a fresh attempt dispatched.

airgapBundles.dockerNoGroup: [TODO] Docker is running but the {{user}} user is not in the docker group, so the build subprocess cannot reach the daemon socket.
airgapBundles.dockerNotInstalled: [TODO] Docker is not installed on this server. Bundle builds need Docker to fetch per-distro Linux packages.
airgapBundles.dockerNotRunning: [TODO] Docker is installed but the daemon is not reachable. Start it with: sudo systemctl enable --now docker.
airgapBundles.dockerPermissionDenied: [TODO] The Docker daemon is running but the {{user}} user (the one running this sysmanage process) cannot read /var/run/docker.sock. Add the user to the docker group, then restart the sysmanage process so the new group set takes effect.

serverRole.loadError: Could not load the current server role.
serverRole.saveError: Could not save the server role.

standard.title: Standard (no air gap)
standard.description: The default. This server manages hosts directly over the network with no air-gap separation. Choose this for any ordinary deployment — it is what every server runs as unless you specifically need one half of an air-gapped pair.

collector.title: Air-Gap Collector (online side)
collector.description: The internet-connected half of an air-gap pair. It mirrors upstream package repositories, gathers CVE and compliance feeds, and bundles them into signed ISO images that you physically carry across the air gap. Choose this on the server that has internet access and builds the media.

repository.title: Air-Gap Repository (disconnected side)
repository.description: The isolated half of an air-gap pair, with no internet access. It ingests the ISO media produced by the Collector, verifies its signature, and serves the packages to managed hosts on the private network so they can update normally. Choose this on the server inside the air-gapped enclave.

serverRole.heading: Server Role
serverRole.intro: Choose how this SysManage server participates in an air-gapped deployment. Most servers should stay on Standard. The role takes effect after the next server restart.
serverRole.restartHint: Restart the SysManage server after saving for the new role to take full effect.
serverRole.saved: Server role saved. Restart the server for it to take full effect.

identity.help: [TODO] Copy this public key and paste it into the peer's federation card so each side can record the other's identity fingerprint and verify it out of band. The private key never leaves this server.

federationRole.intro: [TODO] Choose how this server participates in a multi-site federation. This is independent of the air-gap role on the left — a server can be both. Takes effect after the next restart.
federationRole.loadError: [TODO] Could not load the federation role.

none.description: [TODO] The default. This server is not part of a multi-site federation. Choose this unless you are running a coordinator or a subordinate site.
none.title: [TODO] Not federated

peers.name: [TODO] Peer name
peers.empty: [TODO] No peer identity keys recorded yet.
peers.help: [TODO] Record a peer's public key here to verify its identity fingerprint out of band. The federation connection itself is secured by the TLS certificate pinned during enrollment — these keys are for human verification, not access control.
peers.title: [TODO] Peer identity keys

federationRole.saveError: [TODO] Could not save the federation role.
federationRole.saved: [TODO] Federation role saved. Restart the server for it to take full effect.

site.description: [TODO] A subordinate server that runs autonomously and reports up to a coordinator. It keeps managing its own hosts even when the coordinator is unreachable, replaying queued data on reconnect.
site.title: [TODO] Federation Site

enroll.error: [TODO] Could not enroll with the coordinator.
enroll.help: [TODO] Point this site at its coordinator and paste the one-time enrollment token the coordinator issued (from its Sites page). This site calls back to complete the handshake and begin syncing.
enroll.notEnrolled: [TODO] Not yet enrolled with a coordinator.
enroll.title: [TODO] Enroll with coordinator
enroll.coordIdentityKeyHelp: [TODO] Required. Paste the coordinator's identity public key, obtained out of band (from its Server Role page). This site refuses to enroll unless the coordinator proves this exact key — it is what defeats an enrollment-time man-in-the-middle.

configuration.description: [TODO] Server-wide operational settings. Saved values are stored in the database and override sysmanage.yaml.
configuration.secretSetHelp: [TODO] A password is stored in OpenBAO. Type a new one to replace it.
configuration.secretUnsetHelp: [TODO] Stored securely in OpenBAO, not in the database.
configuration.title: [TODO] Configuration

tenants.disabledBody: [TODO] This server runs in single-tenant mode — there is one implicit tenant (the server itself). Enable "multitenancy.enabled" in sysmanage.yaml and restart to manage multiple tenants here.

domains.help: [TODO] Users whose email domain is on this list may be granted access to the tenant. An empty list means no domain restriction.
domains.none: [TODO] No domains — any domain is allowed.
domains.title: [TODO] Email-Domain Allowlist

tenants.name: [TODO] Name

placement.help: [TODO] Database coordinates for this tenant. The password is never stored here — "OpenBAO role" names the dynamic-credentials role that brokers it.
placement.provisionHint: [TODO] Set and save an OpenBAO role before provisioning.
placement.title: [TODO] Database Placement

tenants.selectPrompt: [TODO] Select a tenant to manage its domains, members, and placement.
tenants.title: [TODO] Tenant Management

autoProvision.help: [TODO] Create this tenant’s database and OpenBAO credentials role, set placement, and run migrations — no command line needed.
autoProvision.notBootstrapped: [TODO] The provisioner identity is not configured. Run "make provision-bootstrap" once before auto-provisioning.
autoProvision.title: [TODO] Auto-Provision

delete.confirmPrompt: [TODO] Type the tenant slug to confirm:
delete.dropDb: [TODO] Also DROP the tenant database — irreversible data loss
delete.dropDbWarn: [TODO] The entire tenant database and all its data will be destroyed.
delete.title: [TODO] Delete tenant
delete.warning: [TODO] This permanently removes the tenant, its members, email-domain allowlist, placement, and its OpenBAO credentials role. This cannot be undone.
